trivia_bullets.text: Fear of the Dark is the black common slot of the Fear-of cycle (14-card Enchantment Creature — Nightmare cohort, Duskmourn: House of Horror), personifying nyctophobia — the fear of the dark — as a 5/5 creature. Its mechanics directly encode the flavor: the attack trigger grants menace and deathtouch only when the defending player controls no Glimmer creatures, meaning the darkness itself becomes predatory once the lights (Glimmer) are gone. [Scryfall: oracle_text, type_line, set]

Illustrated by Sam Wolfe Connelly, who has a dedicated cluster of work across Duskmourn including Say Its Name (DSK-197). Connelly's MTG catalogue extends back to Avacyn Restored (2012), spanning over 22 cards across multiple sets. [Scryfall: artist, set; Gatherer artist search: Sam Wolfe Connelly via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Gatherer artist search via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "The first thing it kills is the light." Six words encoding the card's mechanical condition (no Glimmer creatures = no light = the creature triggers) directly into its flavor — a clean rules-flavor lock. [Scryfall: flavor_text]

As a {4}{B} 5/5 common, Fear of the Dark is a sizeable threat for Pauper and is legal in that format. Its conditional menace+deathtouch trigger creates a cross-mechanic dependency on the Glimmer creature subtype introduced in DSK, making it mechanically bound to its set context rather than universally applicable. EDHREC rank 12,463 among all Commander-legal cards. [Scryfall: legalities pauper:legal, cmc:5, power:5, toughness:5, edhrec_rank:12463]
